title: oenothera cespitosa subsp. jonesii
intro: Oenothera cespitosa subsp. jonesii, also known as Jones' evening primrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Oenothera cespitosa subsp. jonesii include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant support. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support skin health, immune function, and overall well-being.
